tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All parameters are within normal limits except for mildly elevated HbA1c (6.1%), indicating prediabetes, and slightly high HDL cholesterol (63.1 mg/dL), which is generally protective. Renal function, electrolytes, and lipid profile are otherwise unremarkable. Recommend monitoring glycemic control and lifestyle modification to prevent progression to diabetes.

text.div: Provider Organization: Ospedale Vecchio di Montebelluna
